# PHBackgroundResourceUploadProcessingResult.failure

**Case**

the extension failed the processing task with an error

## Declaration

```swift
case failure
```

## Processing results

- **PHBackgroundResourceUploadProcessingResult.completed**: the extension has completed all processing required and is up to date with the photos library
- **PHBackgroundResourceUploadProcessingResult.processing**: the extension has only partially completed its processing and still requires more time
